headline: Main surfaces now carry a lighter footer build rail so the current build, notes, and page note path stay visible without feeling internal.
notes: Adds a subtle footer build rail to the main reading and planning surfaces so the current release stays visible with one-tap access to Build notes and Page feedback.
Replaces the heavier 'What's new' footer wording with a cleaner public-facing Build notes label across the main app chrome.
Keeps release handoff visible after deploy without turning the product chrome into a QA dashboard.
